text:
I'm going to forever take <https://futureofcoding.org/episodes/065.html|the FoC podcast episode on Rules of Code> as license to consider the law and philosophy in scope here. Here's a fantastic bit of writing, just in holding my debased attention span 40 years later: <https://www.lwionline.org/sites/default/files/2016-09/v5%20White.pdf|James Boyd White, "Law as rhetoric, rhetoric as law: The arts of cultural and communal life">

(<https://merveilles.town/@akkartik/114696173432651695|A hack for sticking with it.>)

elements.text: the FoC podcast episode on Rules of Code

James Boyd White, "Law as rhetoric, rhetoric as law: The arts of cultural and communal life"
A hack for sticking with it.

text: We have a free spot in our FoC meetup Wednesday 25th of June 18:00UT, so if anyone still wants to present something about their project. Check our <https://futureofcoding.org/meetups> guidelines if you want to demo/present :-)
